Package neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment

Class OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor.MonthlyStatus

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment.OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor.MonthlyStatus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor
public static class OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor.MonthlyStatus extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable monthly compliance status result.

  • Constructor Details

    • MonthlyStatus

      public MonthlyStatus(double weightedAverageMgL, double remainingAllowedAverageMgL, double projectedMonthlyWaterVolumeM3, double remainingWaterVolumeM3, OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor.ComplianceStatus status, String recommendation)
      Creates a monthly status object.
      Parameters:
      weightedAverageMgL - weighted OIW average in mg/L
      remainingAllowedAverageMgL - remaining allowed average in mg/L
      projectedMonthlyWaterVolumeM3 - projected monthly water volume in m3
      remainingWaterVolumeM3 - remaining water volume in m3
      status - compliance status
      recommendation - recommendation text
